name: Arabic RAG Pipeline (Complete)
description: Full-stack Arabic Retrieval-Augmented Generation: BGE-M3 embeddings + BGE reranker + ALLaM 7B. Upload documents in Arabic, ask questions, receive answers with citations. PDPL-compliant, in-kingdom processing.

documents: النظام الضريبي السعودي لعام 2024 - قانون الشركات الأجنبية
قانون الحماية من التمييز - تشريعات PDPL السعودية
params.query: ما هي متطلبات الامتثال للشركات الأجنبية بموجب القانون الضريبي السعودي؟

model_cache.behavior: All three models (embeddings, reranker, LLM) cached persistently. First cold-start: 10-15 min. Subsequent starts: <30 sec.

documents.text: عقد التوظيف السعودي - المادة 45: حقوق الموظف الأجنبي...
لائحة وزارة الموارد البشرية - الفصل 3: التزامات صاحب العمل...

input.query: ما حقوق الموظف الأجنبي في السعودية؟

output.answer: وفقاً لعقد التوظيف السعودي والتشريعات ذات الصلة، يتمتع الموظف الأجنبي بالحقوق التالية: [1] الحق في الراتب والمزايا المتفق عليها، [2] الحق في الإجازة السنوية، [3] الحق في التأمين الاجتماعي... الأساس القانوني: عقد التوظيف المادة 45، لائحة الوزارة الفصل 3.

tier_notes: Cached tier: all three models pre-fetched to provider. Cold-start 10-15 min (first run), subsequent <30 sec. Enterprise-grade latency for production RAG applications.

deployment_components.role: Convert Arabic documents to embedding vectors. Supports 110+ languages including Modern Standard Arabic (MSA) and regional dialects.
Re-rank retrieved documents by relevance. Cross-lingual support; improves Arabic query→Arabic document matching by 20-30%.
deployment_components.health_check: POST /rerank with query and passages should return relevance scores

deployment_components.role: Generate Arabic answers based on retrieved documents. Purpose-built for Arabic understanding, Sharia law concepts, and Saudi business terminology.
deployment_components.health_check: POST /complete with Arabic prompt should return coherent Arabic response
alternative_models: inception-mbzuai/jais-13b-chat (26 GB, 13B params, higher quality answers)
meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct (16 GB, multilingual, slightly lower Arabic quality)

use_cases.example: Ministry of Labor: Process employment law documents (1000+ pages) to answer employee queries 24/7. PDPL-compliant → data stays in KSA.
use_cases.roi: Save 50 govt employees × 2 hrs/day × 250 working days × 150 SAR/hr = 3.75M SAR/year. DCP cost: 200K SAR/year = 18x ROI.

use_cases.example: Corporate law firm: Analyze 500 contracts in Arabic, extract liability clauses, flag risks. 1 lawyer would take 40 hours; RAG does it in 2 hours.
use_cases.roi: Save 1 lawyer × 38 hrs × 500 SAR/hr = 19K SAR per project. DCP cost: 100 SAR. Break-even: 2 projects/month.

use_cases.example: Saudi bank: Compliance check on Sharia-law documents, regulatory updates (SAMA, SACP). Answer: 'Is this transaction Sharia-compliant?' in seconds.
use_cases.roi: Reduce compliance review time 80%, prevent regulatory violations (multi-million SAR fines). DCP cost: 5K SAR/month.

use_cases.example: Hospital system: Index 100K+ Arabic medical records. Doctor asks: 'Patients with similar symptoms + treatment X?' Returns 10 cases in 5 seconds.
use_cases.roi: Improve diagnosis speed 40%, reduce misdiagnosis risk. PDPL compliance (data never leaves KSA).

competitive_positioning.vs_hyperscalers: AWS Bedrock + S3: $15/hr + data egress fees + 'data may be processed in US' disclaimer. DCP: $45/hr SAR = $12 USD, PDPL-compliant, data stays in KSA. 33% cheaper, 100% compliant.
competitive_positioning.vs_openai_api: GPT-4 turbo: 50K context, $0.01/1K input tokens, no PDPL guarantee. ALLaM RAG: 8K context, no per-token cost, PDPL-guaranteed. Best for enterprises needing Sharia-compliant decisions.
competitive_positioning.vs_vast_ai_runpod: General GPU marketplace: no pre-integrated RAG, cold-start 15 min, must build RAG stack yourself. DCP Arabic RAG: integrated stack, prefetched (2 sec cold-start), one-click deploy. Enterprise-grade convenience.
competitive_positioning.unique_advantage: Only local provider of Arabic RAG-as-a-service with PDPL compliance. Competitors (Vast.ai, RunPod, AWS) cannot offer this without Saudi subsidiary + local ops team.

compliance_and_security.pdpl: ✓ All processing occurs on Saudi infrastructure. Data never leaves Saudi Arabia. Compliant with Saudi Arabia Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL).
compliance_and_security.data_retention: Data retained only during session. No logs, no model fine-tuning on customer data.
compliance_and_security.encryption: TLS in-transit, encrypted at-rest on provider SSD.
compliance_and_security.audit: Provider logs all access. Audit trail available for compliance review.

prerequisites_and_requirements.hardware: H100 (recommended) or 2x RTX 4090 with 40+ GB combined VRAM. Persistent SSD: 150 GB (/opt/dcp/model-cache).
prerequisites_and_requirements.networking: 100+ Mbps sustained internet (for prefetch). Connectivity to HuggingFace Hub (no proxy/VPN).
prerequisites_and_requirements.prefetch: Pre-cache all 3 models (7+5+24=36 GB) to avoid 15-min cold-start on first run. See PREFETCH-DEPLOYMENT-PROCEDURE-SPRINT27.md.

limitations_and_known_issues: Context window: 8K tokens (ALLaM). Longer documents require summarization or chunking.
Dialects: Optimized for Modern Standard Arabic (MSA). Gulf/Levantine dialects supported but lower accuracy.
Latency: 3-5 second end-to-end. Not suitable for sub-second real-time applications.
Cost: 40+ GB VRAM expensive. Recommend for batch/office hours workloads, not 24/7 production (unless parallelized across providers).
future_enhancements: Smaller ALLaM variant (3B) for 24 GB VRAM devices (RTX 4090)
Multi-lingual RAG (Arabic + English + French) for MENA enterprises
Fine-tuning on customer domain (legal precedents, company policies)
